metadata.name: Global Manufacturing Product Space
metadata.description: A network of 200 products across electronics, textiles, chemicals, machinery, and agriculture demonstrating industrial complexity and proximity.

products.name: Silicon Wafers
products.description: Thin slices of semiconductor material used as the substrate for integrated circuits.

products.name: Integrated Circuits
products.description: Set of electronic circuits on one small flat piece of semiconductor material.

products.name: Printed Circuit Boards
products.description: Boards that mechanically supports and electrically connects electronic components.

products.name: Microprocessors
products.description: Computer processor where the data processing logic and control are included on a single integrated circuit.

products.name: Memory Modules
products.description: Circuit boards with memory chips used for data storage in computers.

products.name: Capacitors
products.description: Passive electronic components that store electrical energy in an electric field.

products.name: Resistors
products.description: Passive electrical components that implement electrical resistance.

products.name: Smartphones
products.description: Portable electronic devices that combine mobile telephone and computing functions.

products.name: Laptops
products.description: Small, portable personal computers with a clamshell form factor.

products.name: Tablets
products.description: Mobile devices with a touchscreen display and battery in a single package.

products.name: LED Displays
products.description: Display technology that uses light-emitting diodes.

products.name: LCD Screens
products.description: Flat-panel displays using liquid crystal technology.

products.name: Optical Fibers
products.description: Flexible, transparent fiber made by drawing glass or plastic.

products.name: Laser Diodes
products.description: Semiconductor devices that produce coherent light.

products.name: Electric Motors
products.description: Electrical machines that convert electrical energy into mechanical energy.

products.name: Transformers
products.description: Passive components that transfer electrical energy between circuits.

products.name: Batteries (Li-Ion)
products.description: Rechargeable batteries using lithium-ion technology.

products.name: Solar Panels
products.description: Devices that convert light into electricity using photovoltaic cells.

products.name: Wind Turbines
products.description: Devices that convert wind energy into electricity.

products.name: Power Drills
products.description: Handheld power tools used for making holes.

products.name: Industrial Lathes
products.description: Machine tools that rotate a workpiece to perform various operations.

products.name: CNC Machines
products.description: Automated milling machines that drill and cut material.

products.name: Hydraulic Pumps
products.description: Mechanical sources of power that convert mechanical energy into hydraulic energy.

products.name: Bearings
products.description: Machine elements that constrain relative motion and reduce friction.

products.name: Gears
products.description: Rotating machine parts having cut teeth which mesh with another toothed part.

products.name: Fasteners
products.description: Hardware devices that mechanically join or affix objects together.

products.name: Steel Pipes
products.description: Hollow cylindrical tubes made of steel used for conveying fluids.

products.name: Aluminum Sheets
products.description: Flat rolled products of aluminum used in various industries.

products.name: Copper Wire
products.description: Metallic wire used for electrical conduction.

products.name: Iron Castings
products.description: Metal objects formed by casting molten iron in a mold.

products.name: Cotton Fiber
products.description: Natural fiber used to make textile products.

products.name: Wool Yarn
products.description: Spun fiber made from wool used for knitting or weaving.

products.name: Synthetic Fiber
products.description: Man-made fibers created through chemical synthesis.

products.name: Woven Fabrics
products.description: Fabrics made by weaving threads on a loom.

products.name: Knitted Fabrics
products.description: Fabrics created by interlocking loops of yarn.

products.name: T-Shirts
products.description: Casual short-sleeved garments.

products.name: Denim Jeans
products.description: Trousers made from denim fabric.

products.name: Suits
products.description: Set of garments made from the same cloth.

products.name: Sports Shoes
products.description: Footwear designed for physical exercise or sports.

products.name: Leather Boots
products.description: Durable footwear covering the foot and part of the leg.

products.name: Rubber Soles
products.description: Bottom part of footwear made from rubber.

products.name: Dyes

products.name: Sewing Machines
products.description: Machines used to stitch fabric and other materials together.

products.name: Textile Looms
products.description: Devices used to weave cloth.

products.description: Systems used to cool and dehumidify the air.

products.description: Devices used to heat a space.

products.description: Devices that use suction to remove debris from surfaces.

products.description: Appliances used to brew coffee.

products.description: Electrical devices used for shaving.

products.description: Mass-produced writing materials and office supplies.

products.description: Tools consisting of a tough blade used for cutting wood.

products.description: Tools used to provide grip and mechanical advantage in applying torque.

products.name: Helium
products.description: A noble gas with extremely low boiling point and high thermal conductivity, used in cryogenics, pressurization, leak detection, and controlled atmospheres.
